emails.subject: Russian NDAs
emails.body: Thanks for your help with the Russian NDAs! They did sign them, and even then we didn't show them anything crucial, so I think we're covered. -MP

emails.subject: RE: Russian NDAs
emails.body: RE: Russian NDAs Are you having our copy walked up to me? To: Jones, Tana; Koehler, Anne C.

emails.subject: RE: Russian NDAs
emails.body: Yes, they should be there shortly. Thanks again, MP To: Palmer, Mark S. (ENW)
